expectations.evidence: generateReport is ~28 lines. All helper functions are under 15 lines.
filterOrders, sortOrders, computeStats, formatCsv, formatJson, formatText, renderReport, buildChartSuffix are all pure.
Fetch, compute, format, and delivery separated into distinct functions.
12 args replaced with structured objects: ReportQuery, ReportOutput, EmailDelivery, ReportDeps.
Report generation (query) and email sending (command) are separate concerns; email is conditional side effect.
Explicit interfaces: Order, User, SortField, ReportFormat, ReportQuery, ReportOutput, EmailDelivery, ReportDeps.
Dependencies injected via `deps: ReportDeps` parameter containing db, cache, logger, mailer, gzip.
